Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}A Persona created through fusion can inherit select skills from the base Personas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Inheritable skills differ between Personas. The more skills the base Personas have, the more skills that can be inherited.[n]{f 1 1}
